reasoning: The statistical tool provides a combined probability of 0.44 for a near-term increase above the May 23 closing price of 206.36. We anchor on this for the 1-week horizon (using 0.45). American Tower recently had strong Q1 2025 earnings, leading to analyst price target upgrades (to ~$248-$250), which supports the general positive drift of equities. As the forecast horizon extends, standard market drift and uncertainty pull our estimates closer to 0.5 (from below 0.5 back to slightly above 0.5). Thus, our estimates progress steadily from 0.45 up to 0.52 for the 6-month target, recognizing that weekly stock moves are highly noisy and mostly unpredictable.
